author: y4rr
content:
Phase 1B (#985) value-parity attempt failed at strict loader's UnmappedFixtureKey check.

Verbatim panic: 'MobileNetV2: loader failed on well-formed fixture: invalid argument: MobileNetV2 value-parity loader: torchvision key "features.13.conv.3.bias" has no mapping to a ferrotorch parameter and is not a declared BN buffer'

Root cause: ferrotorch-vision/src/models/mobilenet.rs documents impl as 'simplified' — uses standard Conv2d in place of depthwise+pointwise pairs and omits BN. torchvision's mobilenet_v2 has features.N.conv.0/1/2/3 (depthwise + pointwise + BN), 158 params + 104 fp_buffers. Ferrotorch's MobileNetV2 has only Conv2d weights, no BN.

Phase 1B test infra in place; tests #[ignore = "#990 ..."] until ferrotorch impl gains depthwise + BN.
